ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Shrimp 90% (shrimp, table salt), garlic-chili marinade 10% (rapeseed oil, maltodextrin, table salt, sugar, garlic 0.6%, starch, spices (contains celery), paprika, extra virgin olive oil, paprika spice extract, chili 0.1%). May contain traces of sulphites.
product_name: Garnelen, roh, geschält, entdarmt, mit Knoblauch-Chili-Marinade
